after_school_clubs.name: Coding Creators (Grades 2–3)
after_school_clubs.description: Introductory coding club where students use block-based programming to design simple games and animations.

after_school_clubs.name: LEGO Engineering
after_school_clubs.description: Hands-on building challenges that introduce basic engineering concepts using LEGO bricks.

after_school_clubs.name: Creative Dance
after_school_clubs.description: Students explore movement, rhythm, and simple choreography in a supportive environment.

after_school_clubs.name: Art Explorers
after_school_clubs.description: Painting, drawing, and mixed media projects that encourage creativity and self-expression.

after_school_clubs.name: Chess Club
after_school_clubs.description: Students learn chess strategies and practice through friendly matches and tournaments.

after_school_clubs.name: Soccer Skills
after_school_clubs.description: Fundamental soccer skills, teamwork, and scrimmage games outdoors (weather permitting).

after_school_clubs.name: Science Discovery Lab
after_school_clubs.description: Hands-on experiments in chemistry, physics, and life science tailored for elementary students.

after_school_clubs.name: Homework Help Center
after_school_clubs.description: Quiet, structured time with teacher support for completing homework and building study skills.

after_school_clubs.name: Robotics Team
after_school_clubs.description: Students design, build, and program small robots to complete age-appropriate challenges.

after_school_clubs.name: Spanish Language & Culture
after_school_clubs.description: Introductory Spanish vocabulary, songs, and cultural activities.

after_school_clubs.name: Basketball Basics
after_school_clubs.description: Skill development and scrimmages for beginning basketball players.

after_school_clubs.name: Green Thumb Garden Club
after_school_clubs.description: Students learn about plants, composting, and caring for the school garden.

bus_routes.name: Maple Street Express
bus_routes.description: Morning and afternoon route serving Maple Street, Pine Avenue, and the north neighborhood.

bus_routes.name: Maple Street & Oak Loop
bus_routes.description: Neighborhood loop including Maple Street, Oak Lane, and Birch Court with limited stops.

bus_routes.name: Maple Street Late Run
bus_routes.description: Later-arriving route serving Maple Street and downtown apartments.

bus_routes.name: Hillside Estates
bus_routes.description: Serves Hillside Estates and Cedar Ridge neighborhoods.

bus_routes.name: Lakeview Circle
bus_routes.description: Loop route around Lakeview Circle and Parkside Drive.

bus_routes.name: Downtown Connector
bus_routes.description: Connects downtown apartments with the school; no Maple Street stops.

bus_routes.name: South Side Route
bus_routes.description: Serves South Side homes and the community center.

bus_routes.name: Afternoon Activities Shuttle
bus_routes.description: Afternoon-only shuttle from school to community activity hubs.

bus_routes.name: Rural East Route
bus_routes.description: Long-distance route for rural east families.

bus_routes.name: Temporary Construction Detour
bus_routes.description: Route currently inactive due to road construction.

enrollment_requirements.name: Immunization Record
enrollment_requirements.description: Official immunization record from a healthcare provider or state registry.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Upload a scanned copy or bring a printed copy to the main office before the first day of school.

enrollment_requirements.name: Birth Certificate
enrollment_requirements.description: Certified copy of the student's birth certificate or acceptable proof of age.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Provide a certified copy; the office will make a photocopy and return the original to you.

enrollment_requirements.name: Proof of Address
enrollment_requirements.description: Recent utility bill, lease agreement, or mortgage statement showing the family’s current address.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Document must be dated within the last 60 days and list the parent/guardian name and address.

enrollment_requirements.name: Enrollment Application Form
enrollment_requirements.description: Standard enrollment form with student and family information.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Complete all sections and sign electronically before submitting online.

enrollment_requirements.name: Student Health History Form
enrollment_requirements.description: Health questionnaire completed by the parent/guardian.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: List all allergies, medications, and medical conditions. Update annually or as health needs change.

enrollment_requirements.name: Home Language Survey
enrollment_requirements.description: Survey to identify languages spoken at home for support services.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Complete one survey per family and indicate all languages spoken in the home.

enrollment_requirements.name: Prior School Records Release
enrollment_requirements.description: Authorization form allowing the school to request records from the previous school.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Complete only if your child is transferring from another school.

enrollment_requirements.name: Enrollment Processing Fee
enrollment_requirements.description: Annual processing fee for new student enrollment.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Pay online via the enrollment portal or in person at the main office. Fee waivers are available upon request.

enrollment_requirements.name: Residency Affidavit
enrollment_requirements.description: Affidavit for families living with another household to verify residency.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Complete if you are unable to provide a traditional proof of address document.

enrollment_requirements.name: Legal Guardianship Documents
enrollment_requirements.description: Court orders or legal documents establishing guardianship, if applicable.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Only required if the enrolling adult is not the biological or adoptive parent.

enrollment_requirements.name: Allergy Action Plan
enrollment_requirements.description: Action plan completed by a healthcare provider for students with severe allergies.
enrollment_requirements.instructions: Required for students with life-threatening allergies. Return form before the first day of school.

events.title: PTA Welcome Meeting & Ice Cream Social
events.description: Meet PTA board members, learn about volunteer opportunities, and enjoy ice cream with other families.

events.title: PTA Family Game Night
events.description: An evening of board games and snacks for students, parents, and siblings.

events.title: PTA STEAM Night
events.description: Hands-on science, technology, engineering, art, and math activities for the whole family.

events.title: PTA Holiday Cookie Swap
events.description: Bring a favorite family cookie recipe to share; hot cocoa will be provided.

events.title: First Day of School
events.description: First instructional day for all students for the 2025–2026 school year.

events.title: Curriculum Night (Grades 1–3)
events.description: Parents and guardians are invited to visit classrooms and learn about the curriculum.

events.title: Fall Parent-Teacher Conferences
events.description: Scheduled conferences between families and teachers (no classes for students).

events.title: Fall Festival
events.description: Outdoor games, crafts, and food trucks to celebrate the fall season.

events.title: Winter Music Concert
events.description: Performances by the school choir and instrumental ensembles.

events.title: State Testing Window (Grades 3–5)
events.description: Standardized testing for grades 3–5. Exact dates by grade will be shared by teachers.

events.title: Staff Professional Development Day
events.description: No school for students; professional learning sessions for staff.

events.title: Spring Field Day
events.description: Outdoor games and activities organized by the PE department.

events.title: Kindergarten Orientation
events.description: Informational session and classroom tours for incoming kindergarten families.

policy_documents.title: Student Technology Acceptable Use Policy (2025)
policy_documents.description: Guidelines for responsible student use of school devices, networks, and online resources.
policy_documents.full_text: This policy outlines expectations for responsible and safe use of technology at school and at home when accessing school-provided resources...

policy_documents.title: 1:1 Device Program Guidelines (2024)
policy_documents.description: Information and expectations for students issued a school-owned tablet or laptop.
policy_documents.full_text: All students participating in the 1:1 device program must follow these guidelines regarding care, transport, and appropriate use of devices...

policy_documents.title: Digital Citizenship & Online Safety Policy (2023)
policy_documents.description: Policy describing expectations for respectful and safe behavior in online spaces.
policy_documents.full_text: The purpose of this policy is to promote positive digital citizenship habits and ensure that students understand how to stay safe online...

policy_documents.title: Student Device Agreement Form
policy_documents.description: Form to be signed by students and parents acknowledging technology use expectations.
policy_documents.full_text: By signing this agreement, the student and parent/guardian acknowledge receipt of the Technology Acceptable Use Policy...

policy_documents.title: Health & Safety Protocols
policy_documents.description: Overview of current health and safety practices, including illness guidelines.
policy_documents.full_text: To maintain a safe learning environment, the school follows these health and safety protocols...

policy_documents.title: Enrollment & Residency Policy
policy_documents.description: Requirements for enrollment, residency verification, and grade placement.
policy_documents.full_text: This policy explains who is eligible to enroll at our school and what documentation is required to establish residency...

policy_documents.title: Student Code of Conduct
policy_documents.description: Behavior expectations and disciplinary procedures for all students.
policy_documents.full_text: The Student Code of Conduct outlines expectations for student behavior in classrooms, on the bus, and at school events...

policy_documents.title: Transportation & Bus Safety Guidelines
policy_documents.description: Rules and procedures for riding the school bus safely.
policy_documents.full_text: Students are expected to follow these guidelines when waiting for, boarding, riding, and exiting the school bus...

policy_documents.title: School Nutrition & Wellness Policy
policy_documents.description: Standards for school meals, snacks, and physical activity.
policy_documents.full_text: Our Nutrition & Wellness Policy is designed to support healthy eating and physical activity for all students...

policy_documents.title: PTA Bylaws
policy_documents.description: Governing document for the Parent-Teacher Association.
policy_documents.full_text: These bylaws govern membership, leadership, and decision-making processes of the PTA...

staff_members.name: Emily Smith
staff_members.bio: Emily Smith has been teaching Grade 4 math and science for 8 years and enjoys making hands-on lessons that build problem-solving skills.

staff_members.name: Jason Lee
staff_members.bio: Jason Lee focuses on literacy and social studies instruction, integrating project-based learning and class discussions.

staff_members.name: Ana Rodriguez
staff_members.bio: Principal Rodriguez leads the school with a focus on inclusive practices, strong family partnerships, and joyful learning.

staff_members.name: Mark Johnson
staff_members.bio: Mark Johnson supports student services, attendance, and school-wide behavior initiatives.

staff_members.name: Sophie Clark
staff_members.bio: Sophie Clark loves helping second graders grow their confidence in reading and math.

staff_members.name: Daniel Brown
staff_members.bio: Daniel Brown creates a warm and structured classroom to help first graders develop foundational skills.

staff_members.name: Linh Nguyen
staff_members.bio: Linh Nguyen teaches visual arts and coordinates school-wide art exhibits.

staff_members.name: Ravi Patel
staff_members.bio: Ravi Patel leads the school choir and teaches general music classes.

staff_members.name: Olivia Green
staff_members.bio: Counselor Green supports students with social-emotional learning, small groups, and individual counseling.

staff_members.name: James Martin
staff_members.bio: James Martin manages bus routes, schedules, and transportation inquiries for families.

staff_members.name: Maria Ramos
staff_members.bio: Maria Ramos oversees school meals, menu planning, and nutrition guidelines.

staff_members.name: Carlos Hernandez
staff_members.bio: Carlos Hernandez supports classroom technology integration and manages student device deployment.

school_tours.title: Fall Campus Tour & Info Session
school_tours.description: Guided walkthrough of classrooms, playgrounds, and common areas followed by a brief Q&A.

school_tours.title: Winter Morning School Tour
school_tours.description: See classrooms in action during the school day and learn about our core programs.

school_tours.title: Early Spring Campus Tour
school_tours.description: Principal-led tour focused on academics, specials, and student support services.

school_tours.title: Spring School Day Tour
school_tours.description: Join a small group tour to visit K–5 classrooms and learn about our curriculum.

school_tours.title: Afternoon Tour for Working Families
school_tours.description: Later-afternoon tour highlighting after-school programs and extended-day options.

school_tours.title: May After-School Tour
school_tours.description: Guided tour of the school directly after dismissal, with an overview of admissions and enrollment steps.

school_tours.title: Afternoon Tour & Q&A
school_tours.description: Small-group tour followed by a Q&A with a Grade 1 and Grade 2 teacher.

school_tours.title: Morning Visit Day
school_tours.description: General information session and campus tour for prospective families.

school_tours.title: Saturday Open House
school_tours.description: Family-friendly open house with self-guided tours, student work displays, and staff booths.

school_tours.title: Kindergarten & Grade 1 Focus Tour
school_tours.description: Tour of early elementary classrooms with information on readiness and daily routines.

school_tours.title: Late Afternoon Working Parent Tour
school_tours.description: Tour scheduled later in the afternoon for families who cannot attend morning sessions.

school_tours.title: End-of-Month After-School Tour
school_tours.description: Overview tour with emphasis on enrichment and after-school club offerings.

school_tours.title: Summer Preview Tour
school_tours.description: Tour for families planning ahead for the upcoming school year, including a brief enrollment overview.

school_tours.title: Late June Morning Tour
school_tours.description: Morning tour highlighting summer improvements and classroom setups.
